hero.title: Your Gateway to Smart Internships
hero.subtitle: Connecting Students with Opportunities under PM Internship Scheme
landing.about.heading: About RiseIntern
landing.about.description: RiseIntern is a smart internship discovery platform designed to connect students with the right opportunities at the right time, under the PM Internship Scheme.
landing.about.point.matching.title: Smart Matching
landing.about.point.matching.text: AI-powered recommendations that align with your skills and career goals.
landing.about.point.interface.title: User-Friendly Interface
landing.about.point.interface.text: Simple, intuitive dashboard designed for maximum ease of use.
landing.about.point.domains.title: Multiple Domains
landing.about.point.domains.text: Explore opportunities in software development, data science, marketing, finance, HR, and beyond.
landing.features.heading: Why Choose RiseIntern?
landing.features.ai.title: 🤖 AI Recommendations
landing.features.ai.text: Smartly matches you with internships aligned to your skills and career goals.
landing.features.ai.modal: Our AI analyzes your skills, preferences, and career goals to recommend the most suitable internships — with a breakdown of exactly why each one matched.
landing.features.dashboard.title: 📊 Smart Dashboard
landing.features.dashboard.text: Track your applications, progress, and personalized suggestions easily.
landing.features.dashboard.modal: Monitor your applications on a kanban-style board, track deadlines, and receive smart suggestions on your dashboard.
landing.features.notifications.title: 🔔 Real-time Notifications
landing.features.notifications.text: Get notified the moment a recruiter shortlists, interviews, or responds to your application.
landing.features.notifications.modal: Never miss an update — status changes on your applications reach you instantly, in-app and by email.
landing.features.bilingual.title: 🌐 Bilingual by Design
landing.features.bilingual.text: Use RiseIntern fully in English or Hindi, switching anytime with one click.
landing.features.bilingual.modal: Every page, form, and message is available in both English and Hindi, so language is never a barrier to opportunity.
landing.internships.heading: Explore Internship Opportunities
landing.internships.softwareDev.title: 💻 Software Development
landing.internships.softwareDev.text: Work on real-world projects, build scalable applications, and sharpen your coding skills.
landing.internships.dataScience.title: 📊 Data Science
landing.internships.dataScience.text: Analyze data, build ML models, and gain hands-on experience with AI-driven insights.
landing.internships.design.title: 🎨 Design
landing.internships.design.text: Create stunning user interfaces and engaging user experiences for modern apps.
landing.internships.marketing.title: 📈 Marketing
landing.internships.marketing.text: Learn digital marketing, SEO, and branding strategies with top mentors.
landing.internships.finance.title: 💼 Finance
landing.internships.finance.text: Get exposure to investment strategies, stock analysis, and financial decision making.
landing.internships.hr.title: 🧑‍🤝‍🧑 Human Resources
landing.internships.hr.text: Learn HR strategies, hiring processes, and people management with industry experts.
landing.bot.heading: Need Help? Meet Your AI Bot Assistant
landing.bot.description: Get instant answers about internships, resume tips, interview preparation, and career guidance. Our smart education bot is available 24/7 to support your journey!
landing.bot.resume.title: Resume Tips
landing.bot.resume.text: Learn how to craft the perfect resume that stands out to recruiters.
landing.bot.interview.title: Interview Prep
landing.bot.interview.text: Get interview preparation tips, practice common questions, and boost your confidence.
landing.bot.guide.title: Internship Guide
landing.bot.guide.text: Understand how to apply, what to expect, and success strategies for internships.
bot.pageSubtitle: Chat with our help bot — pick a topic below or type your own question.
bot.stillNeedHelp: Still need help? Reach out at
bot.greeting: Hi! I'm the RiseIntern help bot 👋
bot.chooseCategory: What would you like help with?
bot.chooseQuestion: Pick a question, or type your own below:
bot.anythingElse: Anything else I can help with?
bot.noMatchFallback: I don't have an answer for that yet — try one of these topics instead:
bot.loginToChatMessage: Log in to ask me anything — the guided topics above are open to everyone, but open-ended questions need an account.
bot.chatErrorFallback: Something went wrong on my end — please try again in a moment.
bot.resume.q1.question: How long should my resume be?
bot.resume.q1.answer: As a student, keep it to one page — recruiters often skim resumes in under a minute, so make every line count.
bot.resume.q2.question: What sections should I include?
bot.resume.q2.answer: Contact details, education, skills, projects or experience, and any achievements or certifications. Skip an objective statement — it rarely adds value.
bot.resume.q3.question: How do I make my resume stand out?
bot.resume.q3.answer: Quantify your impact wherever you can ("improved load time by 40%" beats "improved performance"), and tailor your listed skills to match what the internship actually asks for.
bot.resume.q4.question: Should my resume look different for different roles?
bot.resume.q4.answer: Yes — lead with projects and code for technical roles, and with campaigns or writing samples for marketing or design roles. Match the resume to the internship's domain.
bot.interview.q1.question: How should I introduce myself?
bot.interview.q1.answer: Keep it to 60–90 seconds: who you are, what you're studying, one or two relevant projects or skills, and why this internship interests you.
bot.interview.q2.question: What questions come up most often?
bot.interview.q2.answer: "Tell me about yourself," "Why this role," and a walkthrough of a project or problem you've solved. For technical roles, expect basic questions on the skills listed in the internship.
bot.interview.q3.question: What if I don't know an answer?
bot.interview.q3.answer: Say so honestly, then think out loud — interviewers usually care more about how you reason through a problem than whether you know the exact answer.
bot.interview.q4.question: Should I ask the interviewer questions?
bot.interview.q4.answer: Yes, always have one or two ready — about the team, a typical week, or mentorship. It shows genuine interest.
bot.guide.q1.question: How do I apply on RiseIntern?
bot.guide.q1.answer: Browse internships or check your Recommendations, then click Apply on any listing — you can add an optional cover note before submitting.
bot.guide.q2.question: What happens after I apply?
bot.guide.q2.answer: Your application moves through Applied → Shortlisted → Interview → Offered or Rejected. You'll get a notification, both in-app and by email, every time your status changes.
bot.guide.q3.question: How can I improve my match score on Recommendations?
bot.guide.q3.answer: Keep your skills profile up to date — the matching engine compares your listed skills directly against what each internship requires.
bot.guide.q4.question: Can I apply to more than one internship?
bot.guide.q4.answer: Yes, there's no limit. Track everything you've applied to under "My Applications."
